sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Why Is MRAM Stock Surging Premarket Today?
feed.summary: Everspin Technologies (MRAM) stock surged over 11% in premarket trading due to continued investor optimism concerning a recently expanded $40 million defense deal. This deal involves providing Toggle Magnetoresistive RAM (MRAM) technology to the U.S. Defense Industrial Base over two and a half years. Retail sentiment on Stocktwits was "extremely bullish," with some users predicting significant further upside for the stock.

feed.title: MLTX (Nasdaq) Rule 144 notice shows 150,000 Class A shares sale (04/10/2026)
feed.summary: MoonLake Immunotherapeutics (MLTX) has filed a Rule 144 notice indicating a proposed resale of 150,000 Class A Ordinary shares. The filing specifies a contemporaneous sale of these shares by Jorge Santos da Silva on April 10, 2026, for $2,787,000.00. The shares are listed on Nasdaq, and the filing also references an earlier exchange date of April 5, 2023.

feed.title: Form 144 MAIN STREET CAPITAL CORP For: 30 June By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article announces the filing of Form 144 for MAIN STREET CAPITAL CORP for the period ending June 30. It provides this information without additional details, but includes market data and links to other financial news.

feed.title: Western Digital (WDC) Price Forecast: 50% Gross Margin Record Fails to Stop Triangle Breakdown
feed.summary: Western Digital (WDC) is experiencing a sharp disconnect between its strong fundamental performance and a bearish technical setup. Despite achieving a record 50.5% non-GAAP gross margin in Q3 FY2026 and significant revenue growth due to massive cloud demand and multi-year hyperscale agreements, the stock has broken below a symmetrical triangle formation. Technical analysis suggests a potential decline towards $584–$542, while investors await to see if key support levels hold or if the technical breakdown persists despite the company's robust financial health and shift to a net cash position.

feed.title: BlackRock lifts Caledonia Mining stake above 6% threshold
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has increased its total voting interest in Caledonia Mining Corporation Plc to 6.12%, reaching 1,184,010 voting rights. This significant shareholder change was reported on June 29, 2026, following a threshold crossing on June 26, 2026. The holding includes direct share voting rights, securities lending, and CFDs, signaling a notable shift in institutional ownership for Caledonia Mining.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bancorp outlines its regional banking role as investors watch credit trends
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp is positioning itself as a major regional U.S. bank, with its earnings profile significantly influenced by interest rate movements and credit quality. The bank offers a diversified franchise including retail, commercial, and wealth management services, relying on deposits for funding its loan book. Investors closely monitor loan growth, deposit mix, and credit quality trends, as well as the bank's ability to balance growth with prudent underwriting across its portfolios.

feed.title: Pinnacle West Capital focuses on regulated utility growth as investors watch the power demand cycle
feed.summary: Pinnacle West Capital, a US-based utility holding company, is gaining investor interest due to its reliance on regulated earnings, population growth in Arizona, and investments in grid infrastructure. The company's primary operating subsidiary, Arizona Public Service, serves a rapidly expanding Sun Belt region, supporting long-term electricity demand. Pinnacle West is also engaging in the broader energy transition by investing in transmission, distribution, and generation while managing the shift towards lower-carbon resources.

feed.title: Form 144 GENERAC HOLDINGS INC. For: 1 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article is a brief announcement regarding a Form 144 filing for GENERAC HOLDINGS INC. on July 1st. It provides no further details about the filing's content. The article is published by Investing.com, a financial markets news source.

feed.title: Boeing sets July 28 results call with CEO, CFO at 10:30 a.m.
feed.summary: The Boeing Company (NYSE: BA) will release its second-quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, July 28. President and CEO Kelly Ortberg and EVP and CFO Jay Malave will discuss the results and company outlook during a conference call at 10:30 a.m. ET, which will be accessible via webcast on Boeing’s investor website. This announcement aligns with Boeing's routine pre-earnings disclosures, with past similar notices showing an average stock move of about 2.22%.

feed.title: 124 New Permanent Supportive Homes for Veterans Made Possible in Part by The Home Depot Foundation
feed.summary: Swords to Plowshares announced a $750,000 grant from The Home Depot Foundation to create 124 permanent supportive homes for veterans in San Francisco. The project involves rehabilitating 1035 Van Ness Avenue into a service-enriched housing community with comprehensive support services. This initiative, valued at $44 million, aims to address homelessness among older veterans in California and provides them with stability, dignity, and access to essential care.

feed.title: FDA Authorizes Lower Disease Risk Claim for Select Philip Morris Zyn Nicotine Pouches
feed.summary: The FDA has authorized Philip Morris International's ZYN nicotine pouches to carry a lower disease risk claim, meaning they can now be marketed as reducing the risk of numerous smoking-related diseases when used as a complete substitute for cigarettes. This decision applies to 20 specific ZYN products and requires ongoing monitoring to assess consumer behavior and public health impact. While seen as a significant step for consumers, the FDA reiterates that no tobacco product is safe and non-users should not start.

feed.title: Alliant Energy steady on regulated utility profile and Midwest focus
feed.summary: Alliant Energy Corp. is a regulated utility operating in the U.S. Midwest, focusing on stable service, predictable dividends, and infrastructure investment. The company emphasizes renewable energy projects and grid modernization while aiming to reduce reliance on fossil fuels. Alliant Energy's strategy balances customer affordability, reliability, and environmental goals within the broader U.S. utility sector.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies stock follows its core municipal software business
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies (NYSE: TYL) remains a public-sector software company, with its stock performance anchored to its core municipal software business. The company provides software and services to public agencies for managing various administrative tasks, relying on a recurring revenue model from subscriptions and services. Its market story emphasizes operating model execution, contract renewals, and public-sector digitization, rather than single headline events.

feed.title: What Are Colgate-Palmolive’s Sustainability Plans For 2030?
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive has released its 2025 Sustainability & Social Impact Report, detailing achievements and outlining ambitious 2030 targets. The company aims to build on its previous successes in social impact, consumer health, and environmental preservation. Key goals include reaching 2.7 billion children with oral health education, achieving net-zero carbon emissions by 2040, and implementing deforestation-free sourcing for packaging.

feed.title: Invesco Ltd. outlines its asset management reach across funds and ETFs
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. operates as a global independent investment management firm offering a broad range of mutual funds and exchange-traded funds (ETFs) to both retail and institutional clients. The company's business model relies on scale, distribution reach, and a diversified product shelf, generating revenue primarily from investment management fees tied to assets under management. Invesco's offerings span various asset classes, including equities, fixed income, multi-asset, and alternatives, with a significant emphasis on ETFs for transparent and tradable access to specific indexes, factors, or themes.

feed.title: BKR (NASDAQ) Form 144: 72,000 Class A shares, $3.96M via Fidelity
feed.summary: Baker Hughes Co (BKR) filed a Form 144 notice for the proposed sale of 72,000 Class A shares, valued at approximately $3.96 million, through Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC on NASDAQ. The intended sale date is July 1, 2026. The filing details multiple restricted stock vesting entries from 2022 to 2024, accounting for the shares to be sold.

feed.title: Form 4 T. Rowe Price Group Inc For: 1 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article from Investing.com announces the filing of Form 4 for T. Rowe Price Group Inc., dated July 1st. It also includes general market data, popular news headlines, and various financial instrument prices, but provides no further details regarding the Form 4 filing itself. The content primarily serves as a placeholder or brief alert about the regulatory filing.

feed.title: CDW Corp. holds the line as traders wait for a fresh catalyst.
feed.summary: CDW Corp. (ISIN US1258961002) continues to primarily be influenced by enterprise IT spending and distribution demand. Investors are focusing on the company's upcoming earnings report and new analyst commentary to find fresh catalysts. The company's business model revolves around product resale, configuration, and services for commercial and public-sector clients, with its shares closely mirroring IT refresh cycles and spending patterns.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare (HCA) Reports Promising Gene-Editing Therapy Study Results
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare (HCA) has announced promising results from a gene-editing therapy study published in The New England Journal of Medicine. The study evaluated exa-cel for children aged 5-11 with severe sickle cell disease and transfusion-dependent beta thalassemia, showing all participants achieved significant positive outcomes. Despite these clinical advancements, TD Cowen analyst Ryan Langston lowered HCA's price target due to flat year-over-year revenue, and the company also announced a key executive transition.

feed.title: Devon Energy (DVN): The Most Undervalued American Stock to Invest In
feed.summary: Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE:DVN) is highlighted as one of the most undervalued American stocks. Recent analyst ratings include Morgan Stanley lowering its price target to $63 but maintaining an Overweight rating, and Goldman Sachs reinstating coverage with a Buy rating and a $54 price target, citing the company's focus on its Delaware Basin asset and strong cash flow yield. Raymond James also maintained a Strong Buy rating while adjusting its price target to $66, awaiting portfolio rationalization as a catalyst.

feed.title: Marcus Theatres Records Highest June Revenue of All Time
feed.summary: Marcus Theatres, the fourth-largest theatre circuit in the U.S., announced its highest total revenue for June in company history, driven by the strong performance of "Toy Story 5" and other films. The record-breaking results include admissions, concessions, merchandise, and food and beverage revenue. The company also highlighted significant moviegoer attendance, with over 90 million people estimated to have attended movies in June.

feed.title: DTE Energy Co. outlines strategy as a regulated utility and diversified energy provider
feed.summary: DTE Energy Co. operates as a major regulated utility and energy company in the United States, combining electric and gas operations with complementary businesses to support long-term earnings and infrastructure investment. The company's core operations are built around regulated utility activities, which typically support stable cash flows and long-term capital planning. Beyond its core utility role, DTE Energy Co. participates in additional energy-related businesses, including initiatives tied to renewable energy and efficiency programs.

feed.title: Loews Corp stock hits all-time high at 115.04 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Loews Corp's stock has reached an all-time high of $115.04, reflecting a strong 25.74% increase over the past year. Despite a slight decline in net income for Q1, the company surpassed earnings estimates with a 1.4% revenue increase, and InvestingPro suggests the stock is undervalued with potential for further upside. Loews has also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.0625 per share.

feed.title: The Bull Case For Kimco Realty (KIM) Could Change Following Its Dual Russell 1000 Defensive Inclusions
feed.summary: Kimco Realty (KIM) was recently included in both the Russell 1000 Defensive Index and the Russell 1000 Value-Defensive Index, which could boost its visibility among institutional investors. While this may impact near-term trading, the core investment narrative still hinges on its grocery-anchored centers and leasing performance, alongside ongoing risks from e-commerce and rising interest rates. The company's April 2026 guidance raise for net income per diluted share provides a positive context for these index inclusions.

feed.title: Assurant stock hits all-time high at 274.13 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Assurant Inc. (AIZ) stock has reached an all-time high of $274.13, reflecting a significant 42.25% gain over the past year. The company boasts a "GREAT" financial health score and has raised its dividend for 22 consecutive years. Recent positive developments include a substantial increase in mobile trade-in value for consumers and target price upgrades from analysts Truist Securities and Piper Sandler.

feed.title: Form 144 ANALOG DEVICES INC For: 1 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article announces the filing of Form 144 for Analog Devices Inc. (ADI) on July 1st. It also includes general market data, popular news articles, and various financial instruments such as indices, commodities, bonds, stocks, and cryptocurrencies, alongside trending stock information.

feed.title: Form 144 IRON MOUNTAIN INC For: 1 July By Investing.com
feed.summary: This article announces the filing of Form 144 for IRON MOUNTAIN INC on July 1st. It also presents market data including indices, commodities, and bonds, as well as trending stocks and popular news articles from Investing.com.

feed.title: Truist Financial (TFC) Releases Annual Stress Test Results
feed.summary: Truist Financial (TFC) announced the release of its annual company-run stress test results, conducted according to Dodd-Frank Act regulations. Stephens resumed coverage of Truist Financial with an Overweight rating and a $59 price target, citing improved operating leverage and forecast capital returns. Additionally, Fiserv (FISV) announced the appointment of Takis Georgakopoulos as CEO, succeeding Mike Lyons, who is returning to banking as CEO of Truist Financial.

feed.title: GNRC (NYSE: GNRC) lists option exercise, vesting and three 5,000-share sales
feed.summary: A Form 144 filing by Generac Holdings Inc. (GNRC) details planned and recent transactions involving its common stock. The filing includes a stock option exercise of 3,648 shares and restricted stock vesting of 1,352 shares, alongside three separate sales by Aaron Jagdfeld of 5,000 shares each with specified proceeds. This disclosure provides insight into insider transactions and upcoming share availability but does not detail cash flow or transfer restrictions.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Raises its Price Target on U.S. Bancorp (USB)
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley raised its price target on U.S. Bancorp (USB) to $67 from $64, maintaining an Equal Weight rating, citing positive outlook on banks heading into earnings season. This follows a similar increase by Truist to $66, focusing on the bank's net interest margin expansion and robust consumer deposits. U.S. Bancorp also announced a planned increase in its quarterly common stock dividend and has ample capacity in its share repurchase program.

feed.title: [U.S. Equities] Dow Inc traded sideways, up $70; Nasdaq declined (as of morning, 1st).
feed.summary: This article provides a brief update on U.S. equities, noting that Dow Inc. traded sideways but was up $70, while the Nasdaq declined as of the morning of July 1st.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Raises Price Target on PNC Financial (PNC)
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley raised its price target for PNC Financial Services Group (PNC) to $278, maintaining an Equal Weight rating, while Citi also increased its target to $280 with a Buy rating. The positive outlook comes as PNC announced a planned 18% increase in its quarterly cash dividend to $2.00 per share and demonstrated strong performance in the Federal Reserve's 2026 stress test, maintaining its stress capital buffer at 2.5%.

feed.title: BYD Is On Track To Out-Sell Tesla
feed.summary: BYD is projected to reclaim the title of the world's top seller of fully electric cars from Tesla, having delivered 557,090 battery-electric models in Q2 2026, surpassing Tesla's estimated 396,500. While the overall U.S. auto market faces challenges, Hyundai, Kia, and Honda are experiencing sales growth, largely due to strong hybrid vehicle demand and popular crossover models. Meanwhile, Western automakers are losing significant market share in China to domestic brands that offer more features, better technology, and competitive pricing.

feed.title: Market Chatter: Uber Dismisses Two Leaders of Its AI Data Labeling Business
feed.summary: Uber has dismissed two leaders of its AI data labeling business, including the general manager. This development comes as the company is reportedly preparing to sell the unit, which was responsible for annotating imagery for its self-driving cars.

feed.title: Cigna’s CEO vows to put patients first. Wall Street is watching
feed.summary: Cigna's new CEO, Brian Evanko, is prioritizing patient costs, a move closely observed by Wall Street. The article highlights other relevant stories in healthcare, including state-level 340B policy changes, a hospital-at-home program, and insurers' investments in AI.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on United Rentals to $1,300 From $1,145, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for United Rentals (NYSE:URI) shares to $1,300 from $1,145, while reiterating a "Buy" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a continued positive outlook from the firm on the equipment rental services company. The news follows several other analysts also raising their price targets for United Rentals in recent weeks.

feed.title: Invisalign Maker Align Denies Wrongdoing, Defends Competition Practices As Europe Launches Probe
feed.summary: The European Commission has launched an antitrust investigation into Align Technology Inc., the maker of Invisalign, to determine if the company abused its market position by allegedly requiring dental professionals to use its iTero scanners with Invisalign clear aligners. Align Technology denies any wrongdoing, stating it complies with competition laws and that its market position is driven by product quality and innovation. The company has pledged full cooperation with the investigation and remains confident in its practices.

feed.title: O'Reilly Automotive focuses on steady growth as parts demand supports its model
feed.summary: O'Reilly Automotive, a major specialty retailer of aftermarket automotive parts, continues its steady growth by expanding its store network and distribution capacity. The company benefits from consistent demand for vehicle maintenance and repairs, serving both professional service providers and DIY customers. Its business model is supported by an aging vehicle fleet and extended ownership cycles, making it a key player in the U.S. auto parts market.

feed.title: The Barbie Dreamhouse from Mattel Inc. - accessory playset keeps the brand in US living rooms
feed.summary: The Barbie Dreamhouse from Mattel Inc. is highlighted not just as a dollhouse, but as a three-story accessory ecosystem designed to drive recurring sales of smaller add-ons and expand the Barbie brand experience. It features over 75 pieces, a working elevator, and a rooftop slide into a pool, and is widely available at major US retailers for around $199.99, often found at promotional prices closer to $160. For investors, the Dreamhouse represents a key product within Mattel's strategy to maintain brand engagement and boost accessory sales over time.

feed.title: UBS cuts SLB stock price target to $66 on Iraq headwinds
feed.summary: UBS has lowered its price target for SLB (NYSE:SLB) to $66 from $69 while maintaining a Buy rating, citing headwinds from operations in Iraq which are under force majeure. Despite this, the firm forecasts a recovery in the second half of 2026, driven by accelerating Middle East activity and growth in its Digital unit, although margins are expected to face near-term pressure. SLB has also recently secured a significant contract with Kuwait Oil Company and launched a Digital Marketplace to enhance its offerings in the energy sector.

feed.title: How Expanded Russell Index Inclusion At Merchants Bancorp (MBIN) Has Changed Its Investment Story
feed.summary: Merchants Bancorp (MBIN) has been included in several Russell growth and small-cap indices, including the Russell 2000 Growth and Russell 3000 Growth benchmarks, in late June 2026. This expanded index inclusion is expected to increase the bank's visibility among institutional and index-tracking investors. While this primarily boosts visibility rather than altering fundamental business drivers, the company's investment narrative still focuses on profitability, capital returns, and credit oversight, with credit quality remaining a key watch area.

feed.title: Citizens Financial Group stock hits all-time high at 71.22 USD
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group stock has reached an all-time high of $71.22, reflecting a 56.9% one-year return and a market capitalization of $30 billion. Despite this surge, InvestingPro data suggests the stock is still undervalued. Analysts have responded positively, increasing price targets based on strong financial performance and strategic initiatives, indicating continued investor confidence.

feed.title: Thousands without power in Warren, amid dangerously hot conditions
feed.summary: Thousands of homes and businesses in Warren, Michigan, are without power due to an equipment issue during dangerously hot conditions with heat index values up to 108°. This outage is affecting parts of Warren, impacting residents and forcing some businesses to close. DTE Energy officials state the outage is not due to grid overload from high demand.

feed.title: Constellation Energy stock hits 52-week low at 240.27 USD
feed.summary: Constellation Energy (CEG) stock has fallen to a 52-week low of $240.27, representing a 29% decline over the past six months and 21.19% over the past year. Despite the selloff, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock may be undervalued, noting the company remains profitable and has a "GOOD" financial health score. The company has recently secured a significant long-term nuclear power purchase agreement with Walmart and received an "outperform" rating from Bernstein SocGen Group, highlighting its strategic moves within a challenging energy sector.

feed.title: Citigroup Lowers NIKE (NYSE:NKE) Price Target to $45.00
feed.summary: Citigroup has lowered its price target for NIKE (NYSE:NKE) to $45.00 from $47.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating on the stock despite the company beating quarterly EPS and revenue estimates. This adjustment reflects broader analyst caution, with several other firms also reducing their price targets due to investor focus on a slower turnaround and weak demand, particularly in regions like China. The consensus rating for NKE remains "Hold" with an average target price of $56.10, while insider transactions show directors increasing their holdings.

feed.title: IRM (NYSE: IRM) affiliate sold three blocks of 6,000 shares in 2026
feed.summary: An affiliate of Iron Mountain Inc. (NYSE: IRM) sold three blocks of 6,000 shares each on April 1, May 8, and June 1, 2026, generating proceeds of $616,260.00, $767,460.00, and $760,200.00 respectively. This information comes from a Form 144 SEC filing, which also details a series of restricted stock vesting events that represent the source of some of these shares. The sales were executed through Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC.

feed.title: Pool Corporation focuses on long-term growth as a leading pool supplies distributor
feed.summary: Pool Corporation, a major distributor of swimming pool supplies and equipment, is positioning itself for sustained demand in residential and commercial pool maintenance. The company's business model relies on its extensive distribution network and scale, allowing it to provide a wide range of products efficiently. Demand is driven by residential pool ownership, home improvement trends, and the recurring maintenance needs of existing pools.

feed.title: Vincent T. Roche to sell 10,000 Analog Devices shares (NASDAQ: ADI)
feed.summary: Vincent T. Roche, an insider at Analog Devices (NASDAQ: ADI), has filed a Form 144 to sell 10,000 shares of common stock through a stock option exercise on July 1, 2026. This filing also discloses several previous sales by Roche, including two large sales of 30,000 shares each in May 2026. The transaction will be settled for cash and brokered by Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC.

feed.title: Exelon Corp. holds steady as investors wait for a fresh catalyst.
feed.summary: Exelon Corp. is trading on a straightforward utility backdrop, with its business built around regulated electric and gas operations. The company's earnings path is sensitive to regulatory outcomes, and investors are focused on cash flow visibility, rate-case execution, and upcoming earnings updates. A fresh catalyst for the stock is expected to come from regulatory filings, guidance, or changes in the regulatory environment, rather than product news.

feed.title: Citigroup Lowers Honeywell International (NASDAQ:HON) Price Target to $260.00
feed.summary: Citigroup has lowered its price target for Honeywell International (NASDAQ:HON) to $260.00 from $269.40, while maintaining a "buy" rating. This new target implies a potential upside of approximately 15% from the previous closing price. The company recently reported quarterly earnings of $2.45 EPS, exceeding estimates, though revenue slightly missed expectations, and guided for FY 2026 EPS between $10.35 and $10.65 following its restructuring and aerospace spin-off.
